name: @tearleads/smtp-listener
description: SMTP listener for receiving and storing emails

scripts.test: cross-env DOTENV_CONFIG_QUIET=true sh -c 'if [ "$1" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; if command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1; then bun test "$@"; else vitest run "$@"; fi' --
scripts.test:coverage: cross-env DOTENV_CONFIG_QUIET=true sh -c 'if [ "$1" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; if command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1; then bun test --coverage --concurrency="${PRE_PUSH_MAX_WORKERS:-${PRE_PUSH_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS:-4}}" "$@"; else vitest run --coverage --max-workers="${PRE_PUSH_MAX_WORKERS:-${PRE_PUSH_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS:-4}}" "$@"; fi' --
